name: @postautomation/social-scrapers
description: Vendored, dependency-free social-platform scrapers for follower counts and per-post engagement (fail-open). Used as a resilient fallback for the analytics pipeline.
//resolution: main → SOURCE so the SWC bundler / tsx always resolves it (dist is gitignored + not built in the web Docker image, matching every other workspace pkg). types → COMMITTED .d.ts so consumers' strict tsc reads the declarations (which pass) instead of following into the vendored source (which isn't written for noUncheckedIndexedAccess). Regenerate types with: npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir types
